# Autonomous Inbox-Triage & Draft System

<!-- generated by scripts/generate-positioning.py from positioning-seeds.json · repo: organvm/universal-mail--automation -->

A production system that sweeps Gmail and Apple Mail across accounts, classifies every thread against a protocol ladder, tracks every owed reply in an obligations ledger, and composes voice-matched draft replies — draft-only, it never sends. Deploys as a Cloudflare Worker; runs keyless (IMAP app-password / Apple Mail osascript).

**Built to production weight:** 400+ tests · Cloudflare Worker deploy (wrangler) · Gmail + Apple Mail, keyless · draft-only by design — composes replies, never sends · obligations ledger — every owed reply tracked.

**Who this is for:** Founders, operators, and the people who run their comms — anyone drowning in multi-account email who will not (and should not) hand an AI the send button.

**The expensive problem:** Obligations fall through the cracks — the escalation you missed, the reply you owed a week ago — while triage burns the most expensive hours of the day. Every 'AI email tool' wants send authority nobody sane will give it.

**What it costs you to not have this:** Missed and late replies quietly cost deals and relationships, and the hours spent sorting an inbox by hand are the ones you can least afford to spend that way.

## Ways to work together

Pick the depth that fits. Each level is a deeper build than the last.

| Path | What you get | Cadence |
|------|--------------|---------|
| **1 · Run my inbox triage** (Managed service) | We run the sweep against your accounts and hand you a triaged inbox plus ready-to-send drafts for everything you owe a reply. You press send; we do everything up to it. | Recurring — the engine |
| **2 · Deploy it on my infra** (White-label deploy) | The system under your brand, on your infrastructure (or our managed Worker). Your team owns the triage pipeline instead of renting another SaaS. | Setup + recurring |
| **3 · Build it for my stack** (Custom) | Your protocol rules, your voice, integration into your CRM / helpdesk / ticketing, your compliance vertical — built to your exact workflow. | Project + optional retainer |
| **4 · Run my comms ops** (Fractional / retainer) | We become the engine behind your communications operation — this system, the next integration, the next surface. | Ongoing |

## What's open — and what you're buying

**Open:** the full system — source, the 400+ tests, the protocol ladder, the safety verifiers, how every piece is built. Read all of it.

**What you're buying:** the running instance tuned to your accounts, your protocol rules, and your voice — the live sweep, the ledger, the drafts kept current. The code is open; the engine that quietly runs your inbox (and never once sends without you) is the service.
